guide_seo_desc: Learn how to use all features of the Fat Loss Calculator
guide_science_intro: 1 kg of body fat is roughly equivalent to 7,700 kcal. By consuming fewer calories than you burn each day (creating a calorie deficit), your body taps into stored fat to make up the difference — resulting in fat loss.
guide_science_recommend1: Aim for 0.5–1 kg of weight loss per week. Losing too fast can cause muscle loss and metabolic slowdown
guide_science_recommend2: Women should not go below 1,200 kcal/day; men should not go below 1,500 kcal/day
guide_science_recommend3: Aim for 1.6–2.2g of protein per kg of body weight to help preserve muscle mass
guide_science_recommend4: If you have any health conditions, consult a doctor or dietitian before starting a deficit
guide_ai_title: Let AI Calculate Your Daily Calories
guide_ai_desc: Not sure how many calories you should eat each day? Copy the prompt below into ChatGPT, Claude, or any AI assistant. Fill in your details and the AI will calculate your personalized daily calorie and macronutrient targets.
guide_ai_prompt_label: Copy and send this to an AI:
guide_ai_prompt:
Please help me calculate my daily calorie and macronutrient targets. Here is my information:

- Gender: (Male/Female)
- Age: (years)
- Height: (cm)
- Weight: (kg)
- Body fat %: (if known)
- Activity level: (Sedentary / Lightly active / Moderately active / Very active)
- Goal: (Fat loss / Maintain / Muscle gain)
- Desired weekly weight loss: (kg)

Please calculate my TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) and provide recommended daily intake for calories, protein (g), fat (g), and carbs (g).
guide_ai_hint: Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other AI assistants. Replace the text in parentheses with your actual data.
guide_dashboard_desc: The card at the top of the homepage shows your remaining nutrition goals for the day. As you add food, the remaining values are automatically deducted. If any value goes negative, the card turns red to warn you that you've exceeded your target.
guide_addfood_desc: Record what you eat each day along with its nutritional values.
guide_addfood_step1: Tap the quick tags at the top (e.g. Egg, Banana) to add common foods with one click
guide_addfood_step2: Or manually enter the food name and nutrition values, then tap "Add Food"
guide_addfood_step3: Today's food list appears below and items can be removed at any time
guide_frozen_desc: Designed for frozen meats and similar foods. Frozen food loses water weight after thawing, so nutritional values need to be adjusted proportionally.
guide_frozen_step1: Enter the per-100g nutrition data, original weight, and estimated loss rate
guide_frozen_step2: The system automatically calculates the actual post-thaw weight and corresponding nutrition
guide_frozen_step3: Save frequently used configurations for quick access next time
guide_packaged_desc: Calculate actual nutrition intake from packaged foods. Packages usually list nutrition per 100g, but your actual serving may differ.
guide_packaged_step1: Enter the per-100g nutrition from the package label and the actual weight you consumed
guide_packaged_step2: Use the quick weight buttons to fill in common serving sizes
guide_tags_desc: Manage quick-add tags to make food logging more efficient.
guide_tags_step1: Built-in tags for common foods (Egg, Banana, etc.) can be hidden or have their values edited
guide_tags_step2: Create custom tags with your own food names and nutrition data
guide_tags_step3: Use the eye icon to control whether a tag appears in the quick-add bar on the Add Food page
guide_goals_desc: Set daily nutrition intake goals to track your diet plan.
guide_goals_step1: Create multiple goal sets (e.g. cutting day, training day) and switch between them with a tap
guide_goals_step2: Set daily targets for calories, protein, fat, and carbs
guide_goals_step3: After switching goals, the dashboard updates remaining values automatically
guide_history_desc: View and manage past food records. Filter by today, yesterday, this week, this month, or all. You can edit or delete any individual record.
guide_import_desc: Import or export tag data in JSON format. Easily migrate data between devices or share your food tag library with others.
guide_tip1: All data is stored in your browser's local storage — clearing browser data will erase your records
guide_tip2: Remaining goals reset automatically at midnight, but history records are preserved
guide_tip3: Supports Chinese, English, and Japanese — switch languages in the top-right corner of the homepage
shutdown_notice: Since I have successfully achieved my fat loss goals and am unsure if anyone is using this site, it is planned to shut down on April 20, 2026. If you are a user who would like to continue using it, please contact mailwangjk{'@'}gmail.com and I will decide whether to keep it running.
